title: Venom
desc: A failed reporter is bonded to an alien entity, one of many symbiotes who have invaded Earth. But the being takes a liking to Earth and decides to protect it.

title: K-Ramp
desc: K-Ramp

title: 12Th Fail
desc: Manoj, from a cheating-prone village, fails his exams. Inspired by an honest officer, he dreams of becoming like him, leading him to the challenging UPSC exam.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
desc: In Shanghai, China in the 1940s, a wannabe gangster aspires to join the notorious 'Axe Gang' while residents of a housing complex exhibit extraordinary powers in defending their turf.

title: Fukra Gang
desc: Former delivery agents Babu and Yesu become special agents, tackling thrilling missions filled with humor, surprises, and challenges as they race toward exciting success.

title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
desc: A live studio show offering expert analysis and interviews from Khelo India Youth Games 2025, providing a behind-the-scenes look at the events and discussing key moments with guests and commentators.

title: Badava Rascal
desc: Shankar, a young man, is kidnapped by a gang of thugs. However, in order to escape his predicament, he narrates his life story to make his abductors rethink their decisions.

title: Apradhi Kaun
desc: An unlikely gambler navigates risky deals and deception in a high-stakes world of cards, danger, and unpredictable alliances that test every instinct.
